languages.text: "Истина Изначальная, прими мой дар и благослови мир, что вскоре узрит твое величие! Направь длани возвышения на тех, кто смертью своей исполнит твою волю!"

traits.locale_text: "Истина Изначальная, прими мой дар и благослови мир, что вскоре узрит твое величие! Направь длани возвышения на тех, кто смертью своей исполнит твою волю!"
traits.speaker: DarkApostleMob

languages.text: "Primordial Truth, accept my gift and bless the world that is about to witness your glory! Turn the hands of ascension on those whose demise will serve your will!"
languages.original_text: "Истина Изначальная, прими мой дар и благослови мир, что вскоре узрит твое величие! Направь длани возвышения на тех, кто смертью своей исполнит твою волю!"

traits.locale_text: "Primordial Truth, accept my gift and bless the world that is about to witness your glory! Direct the hands of ascension at those would do your will with their demise!"
traits.speaker: DarkApostleMob

traits.locale_text: "Primordial Truth, accept my gift and bless the world that is about to witness your glory! Direct the hands of ascension at those would do your will with their demise!"
traits.speaker: DarkApostleMob

traits.locale_text: "Primordial Truth, accept my gift and bless the world that is about to witness your glory! Turn the hands of ascension on those whose demise will serve your will!"
traits.speaker: DarkApostleMob

traits.locale_text: "Primordial Truth, accept my gift and bless the world that is about to witness your glory! Turn the hands of ascension on those whose demise will serve your will!"
traits.speaker: DarkApostleMob

traits.locale_text: "Primordial Truth, accept my gift and bless the world that is about to witness your glory! Turn the hands of ascension on those whose demise will serve your will!"
traits.speaker: DarkApostleMob

languages.text: "Urwahrheit, nimm meine Gabe an und segne die Welt, die Zeuge deiner Herrlichkeit werden soll! Wende die Hände des Aufstiegs auf jene, deren Untergang deinem Willen dienen wird!"
languages.original_text: "Primordial Truth, accept my gift and bless the world that is about to witness your glory! Turn the hands of ascension on those whose demise will serve your will!"

traits.locale_text: "Urwahrheit, nimm meine Gabe an und segne die Welt, die Zeuge deiner Herrlichkeit werden soll! Wende die Hände des Aufstiegs auf jene, deren Untergang deinem Willen dienen wird!"

languages.text: "Vérité Primordiale, accepte mon cadeau et bénis le monde qui est sur le point d'être témoin de ta gloire ! Tourne les mains de l'ascension vers ceux dont la disparition servira ta volonté !"
languages.original_text: "Primordial Truth, accept my gift and bless the world that is about to witness your glory! Turn the hands of ascension on those whose demise will serve your will!"

traits.locale_text: "Vérité Primordiale, accepte mon cadeau et bénis le monde qui est sur le point d'être témoin de ta gloire ! Tourne les mains de l'ascension vers ceux dont la disparition servira ta volonté !"

languages.text: "¡Verdad primordial, acepta mi regalo y bendice al mundo que está a punto de presenciar tu gloria! Vuelve las manos de la ascensión sobre aquellos cuya desaparición servirá a tu voluntad".
languages.original_text: "Primordial Truth, accept my gift and bless the world that is about to witness your glory! Turn the hands of ascension on those whose demise will serve your will!"

traits.locale_text: "¡Verdad primordial, acepta mi regalo y bendice al mundo que está a punto de presenciar tu gloria! Vuelve las manos de la ascensión sobre aquellos cuya desaparición servirá a tu voluntad".

languages.text: "Ezeli Gerçek, hediyemi kabul et ve ihtişamına tanıklık etmek üzere olan dünyayı kutsa! Yükselişin ellerini, ölümleri senin iradene hizmet edecek olanların üzerine çevir!"
languages.original_text: "Primordial Truth, accept my gift and bless the world that is about to witness your glory! Turn the hands of ascension on those whose demise will serve your will!"

traits.locale_text: "Ezeli Gerçek, hediyemi kabul et ve ihtişamına tanıklık etmek üzere olan dünyayı kutsa! Yükselişin ellerini, ölümleri senin iradene hizmet edecek olanların üzerine çevir!"
